serviceData.aboutSummary: Full Stack Developer specialized in Spring Boot and Angular, with more than 2 years of experience. I design and build scalable business applications with a strong focus on code quality and intelligent solutions (AI).

exp1.description: Contributed to several full stack business applications combining Spring Boot, Angular, and AI-powered solutions.

achievements.ach1: Built a real-time AI application for facial micro-expression analysis (Synergology)
achievements.ach2: Designed a community platform and art marketplace with a conversational AI assistant (ArtIA)
achievements.ach3: Implemented an intelligent CV extraction and automatic structuring system
achievements.ach4: Integrated AI solutions (STT, TTS, LLM) for voice assistants and chatbots
achievements.ach5: Developed secure applications with authentication and profile management

exp2.description: Final-year project focused on designing and developing an online competition management platform.

achievements.ach1: Built a web platform that automates the competition process
achievements.ach2: Implemented an automatic preselection scoring algorithm
achievements.ach3: Managed online registrations and candidate filtering end-to-end
achievements.ach4: Designed a clear and responsive Angular interface

exp3.description: Internship focused on backend development for a car rental application.

achievements.ach1: Designed and developed a car reservation system
achievements.ach4: Collaborated with the frontend team on feature integration

proj1.title: ArtIA - Marketplace and community platform
proj1.description: Community platform and art marketplace with a conversational AI assistant enabling intelligent navigation from natural language queries.
proj1.shortDescription: Art marketplace with an intelligent AI assistant

features.feat1: Interactive gallery with personalized artist profiles
features.feat2: Secure marketplace for artists and collectors
features.feat3: Conversational AI assistant for intelligent navigation
features.feat4: Natural language search and personalized recommendations

proj2.title: Talent Marketplace
proj2.description: Secure platform connecting talents and companies with robust authentication and complete profile management.

features.feat2: Complete management of talent and company profiles
features.feat4: Robust REST backend with Spring Boot

proj3.title: Synergology - Micro-expression analysis
proj3.description: Real-time AI application for facial micro-expression analysis and behavioral interpretation.

features.feat1: Real-time facial micro-expression detection and interpretation
features.feat2: Integration of Python AI services with a Spring Boot backend
features.feat4: Interactive web interface built with Angular

proj4.title: Made4You - Craft e-commerce platform
proj4.description: Complete e-commerce platform with an AI assistant for customer support and personalized recommendations.

features.feat1: Full management of a craft products catalog
features.feat4: AI assistant for instant customer support

proj5.title: CVThèque - Intelligent CV extraction
proj5.description: Automatic CV extraction and structuring system using AI (Groq API) with a management interface.

features.feat1: Automatic extraction of information from CVs
features.feat3: REST backend API for database insertion
features.feat4: Angular interface for CV upload and management
features.feat5: Intelligent parsing of skills and experience

proj6.title: CallBot - Intelligent voice assistant
proj6.description: Intelligent voice assistant for automatic appointment scheduling using STT, TTS, and LLM.
proj6.shortDescription: AI voice assistant for appointment scheduling

proj7.title: Online competition management (final project)
proj7.description: Web application automating the competition process with online registration and a preselection algorithm.

features.feat2: Automatic preselection score calculation through an algorithm

proj8.title: Car rental application
proj8.description: Web solution for vehicle management and reservations with an availability system.
